{{CargoRelic
|name=Wishing Crystal
|class_id=20296
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=An ancient crystal that emanates a dazzling light and possesses a colorful and shining body. The crystal is imbued with the mystical power of magic, granting its user an endless source of blessing energy.
|fame=17
|art=14
|fth=29
|civ=15
|tech=15
|ss1=Snail ATK +20<br>Per 40 wishes made, Snail ATK +5<br>Wishes Made: 400/400
|ss2=Snail ATK +40<br>Per 40 wishes made, Snail ATK +10<br>Wishes Made: 400/400
|ss3=Snail ATK +60<br>Per 40 wishes made, Snail ATK +15<br>Wishes Made: 400/400
|ss4=Snail ATK +60<br>Per 40 wishes made, Snail ATK +15<br>Wishes Made: 400/400
|ss7=Snail ATK +60<br>Per 40 wishes made, Snail ATK +15<br>Wishes Made: 400/400<br> (Awakened)
}}
